items.title: Bank of America says its wealth management clients may put up to 4% of their portfolio in crypto
items.description: Bank of America is opening up its crypto recommendations to wealth management clients in the year ahead.

items.title: A ‘Junk’ Stock Rally? Waste Management Is Beating the Market Over the Past Month.
items.description: Waste Management, a leader in the garbage collection and recycling businesses, has been a hot stock as of late.  Shares of Waste Management rose nearly 10% in November while the broader market was relatively flat.  Competitors Republic Services and Waste Connections also enjoyed solid Novembers, rising more than 4% and 5% respectively last month.

items.title: A Changing of the Guard: Powell Out, Hassett Favored
items.description: As Jerome Powell's tenure enters its final phase, markets are looking ahead to the next chapter of monetary policy leadership. Trump ally and "dove" Kevin Hassett is the overwhelming favorite to replace Powell.
